data.title: Add opus early-exit sub-step 2a3 and REPLAN_TRIGGER routing to sprint SKILL.md SC coverage gate
data.description:
## What
Add sub-step 2a3 (opus early-exit) and REPLAN_TRIGGER routing logic to the Preplanning Gate section of `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md`, completing the 3-tier SC coverage cascade.

Sub-step 2a3: Only dispatch opus if sonnet returned UNSURE for any SC. If the UNSURE list is empty (all SCs resolved by haiku+sonnet), skip opus entirely (early-exit). Opus returns COVERED or MISSING only (no UNSURE — opus is the final arbiter). Fail-open on parse failure (treat as MISSING to be conservative).

REPLAN_TRIGGER routing: After all three tiers complete, if any SC is MISSING:
1. Write `REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage` comment on the epic (listing the missing SCs)
2. Route to `/dso:preplanning` if at least one child has type:story
3. Route to `/dso:implementation-plan` if all children have type:task

## File Impact
- EDIT: `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` (Preplanning Gate — add sub-step 2a3 and REPLAN_TRIGGER routing block after 2a2)

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Sub-step 2a3 present with conditional early-exit (skip opus if UNSURE list is empty)
2. References `sc-coverage-opus.md` prompt
3. Opus returns COVERED/MISSING only; fail-open treats unparseable as MISSING
4. REPLAN_TRIGGER: sc_coverage comment written when MISSING SCs found
5. Routing: /dso:preplanning when ≥1 child has type:story; /dso:implementation-plan when all type:task
6. All structural test checks (1-10) in `test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh` pass GREEN

## testing_mode
GREEN — completes the test-passing pass for structural test written in 191e-d649

## Dependencies
- Blocked by: 5ced-e8ae (sub-step 2a2 must be in SKILL.md first)

## Done Definition
- SKILL.md edited with sub-step 2a3 and REPLAN_TRIGGER routing
- All 10 structural test checks pass GREEN
